title: Lines Sent To Thomas Conant Of Oshawa, A Writer Of Canadian Sketches
content:
We do greet thee Thomas Conant,
                You truthful paint Canadian charms,
            And you are the great exponent
                Of beauties of her woods and farms.

            You give fine sketch of bird and fowl,
                Of the blue jay and the plover,
            And of great white Canadian owl,
                All proves of nature you're a lover.
meaning:
"Lines Sent To Thomas Conant Of Oshawa, A Writer Of Canadian Sketches" is a quintessential example of James McIntyre's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
